sms.buy.summary.title: Get Number Confirmation
sms.faq.a1: An SMS receiver is an online service that provides virtual phone numbers for receiving SMS verification codes. No real SIM card or phone number is needed — everything works in your browser.
sms.faq.a2: Prices start from $0.01 per SMS, depending on the service and country. Check our pricing page for full details on all supported services.
sms.faq.a3: We support 700+ services including WhatsApp, Telegram, Google, Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter/X, Amazon, Microsoft, and many more.
sms.faq.q4: How long do I have to receive the SMS?
sms.faq.a4: You have 20 minutes to receive the verification code. If you don't receive it within this time, you can cancel the order and receive a full refund.
sms.faq.q5: Can I use the same number multiple times?
sms.faq.a5: No, each virtual number is for single use only. After receiving the SMS, the number is released back to the pool to protect privacy.
sms.privacy.label: 100% Secure
sms.privacy.title: Your phone number stays private
sms.privacy.body1: When you use our SMS receiver service, your real phone number is never exposed to third-party services. All verification codes are received through temporary virtual numbers that are automatically destroyed after use.
sms.privacy.body2: We do not store your verification codes or the content of received SMS messages. All data is transmitted securely and deleted automatically after the rental period expires.
sms.about.label: About
sms.about.title: Global SMS verification platform — 180+ countries, 700+ services
sms.about.body1: Our SMS receiver platform provides virtual phone numbers from over 180 countries, supporting more than 700 popular online services. Whether you need to verify a WhatsApp account, register on a social media platform, or activate an online service, we make it quick, affordable, and privacy-focused.
sms.about.body2: Getting started is simple: search for your desired service, select a country and phone number, pay the small rental fee, and receive your verification code within seconds. Our real-time SMS delivery system ensures you never miss a code.
sms.about.body3: We offer the most competitive pricing in the market, with some numbers available for as little as $0.01. Our global network of telecom partners guarantees high delivery rates and fast verification code reception. Join millions of users who trust our platform for secure, anonymous SMS verification.
